## Inspector ID

`document_shape`

## Layer

source

## Purpose

Cluster files into candidate collections by a composite fingerprint of frontmatter, body structure, and file naming.

## Usage

Inspectors emit evidence: counts and distributions, for the reader to judge. Run this one with:

```
katalyst inspect <target> --inspector document_shape
```
